ksa_text: Knowledge of model inventory management practices including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and documentation standards.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-011 (Risk Management/Knowledge) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.426, highest: NICE at 0.426). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. ISO 8000 data administration: data quality process execution under ISO standards, data records management, quality control procedures, and compliance documentation.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.426, and Risk Management (RM) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA for ISO 8000 Data Administrator?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management competencies do not appear as ISO 8000 Data Administrator requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Risk Management is not a ISO 8000 Data Administrator core competency. Final decision: exclude.
